title: Paper models
wikitext:
[]: Paper models?             Quote Post by Punio4 » Sat Oct 01, 2005 5:16 pm If anyone has a fully downloaded pdf of any eva unit... please send it because even on emule there are only 2 or 3 people with it... thnk you.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Sat Oct 01, 2005 5:18 pm I have Eva-01. Its really confusing. I bought the friggin link, and I feel like an idiot. I dunno how to send it though.

[]:             Quote Post by Punio4 » Sat Oct 01, 2005 5:58 pm just mail it to me... [email protected] i would be most grateful...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Oct 01, 2005 11:43 pm Ask and ye shall receive: http://www.evamonkey.com/paper_models/

[]:             Quote Post by Punio4 » Sun Oct 02, 2005 11:05 am just finished the head... seems that the 2... things that look like jet intakes are too close to the jaw...other than that, its :shock: [edit] i just had a really sick idea... if someone made the model on a defauld A4 paper can he tell me the exact height of the model... while standing straigt... i want to scale it to be human sized approx 175-180 cm in height... [EDIT NO2] the eva01 is missing the printouts for the umbilical cable and prog knife :?
